manuallyAdd.title: Add manually
manuallyAdd.rtspPlaceholder: Please enter the URL link provided by your RTSP device with the following format: rtsp://[username]:[password]@[IP address]:port/video path
manuallyAdd.rtspGuide: How to obtain the RTSP device link
manuallyAdd.rtspGuideContent1: 1. Ensure the camera supports and has RTSP streaming enabled (Path: Camera > Storage or other settings)
manuallyAdd.rtspGuideContent2: 2. Set a static IP for the camera
manuallyAdd.rtspGuideContent3: 3. Ensure the camera and the NAS are on the same local network
manuallyAdd.rtspGuideContent4: 4. Copy the RTSP stream address from the app to the page in the "UGREEN NAS" app
manuallyAdd.ipAndPortTips: Please locate the IP address and port of the camera and configure the ONVIF username and password on the camera itself, then enter them in the fields below. (For detailed settings, please refer to the camera manual)

aiEventAuth.title: Notice for intelligent event recognition
aiEventAuth.intro: You are currently viewing event footage automatically recognized by AI. The system analyzes video footage in real time to recognize event types
aiEventAuth.point1: 1. Analysis is performed on your NAS locally and will not be uploaded to the cloud
aiEventAuth.point2: 2. You can deselect any event type at any time
aiEventAuth.point3: 3. Face detection requires your separate authorization

addSuccess.cameraManagementTips: To avoid abnormal video preview, please adjust camera settings like resolution, frame rate, and encoding format with caution on the camera management side

DataProcessingModal.title: Data processing notice for Surveillance Center
DataProcessingModal.information:
Welcome to Surveillance Center. Before using, please read the following carefully:

This app will receive detection results from the camera. When the local AI detection feature is enabled, the system will analyze your video recordings, which may involve sensitive information such as faces and movement trajectories. Events detected by AI will be marked with an "AI" label. All data is stored on your local NAS

Please confirm and commit to the following: 1. You are the legal administrator of the camera. 2. The camera is installed in a location that does not infringe on others’ privacy. 3. You do not record public areas (e.g., streets, neighbors’ yards, etc.). 4. You have obtained consent from any individuals being recorded
DataProcessingModal.agreementPrefix: I have read and agree to
DataProcessingModal.agreementLinkText: Data processing notice for Surveillance Center

TlsPromptModal.adminContent: To securely transmit recorded video streams, please enable TLS in "UGREEN NAS > Control Panel >Security". Otherwise, video streams will use HTTP on the local network, exposing them to risks of eavesdropping, leakage, and tampering
TlsPromptModal.userContent: To securely transmit recorded video streams, please contact the admin to enable TLS in "UGREEN NAS > Control Panel". Otherwise, video streams will use HTTP on the local network, exposing them to risks of eavesdropping, leakage, and tampering

SettingsAiDetection.faceRecognitionDesc: Use local AI to view and log faces captured by cameras
SettingsAiDetection.plateRecognitionDesc: Use local AI to view and log license plates captured by cameras

EnableAiDetection.cardDesc: Once enabled, the system will use local AI to analyze videos, recognize key events and send notifications or alerts - all without any upload to the cloud. The  NAS device supports adding %s local AI detection tasks

NameSuggestInput.invalidCharFormat: Only Supports Chinese characters, English letters, numbers, spaces, underscores (_), and hyphens (-)

FaceDetailModal.removeConfirmContent: After removal, this person will be recognized as a stranger. You can register this person again

Strangers.title: Face recognition
Strangers.sectionDesc: Strangers will be deleted after one month

StrangerPlates.sectionDesc: Photos of unknown license plates will be deleted after one month

PlateDetailModal.removeConfirmContent: After removal, this license plate will be recognized as "Unknown". You can register it again

AiGuidanceBubble.content: Local AI detection for recordings is now available. Click here to enable it for your camera

AiDetectionConfig.performanceWarningContent: Enabling this feature may cause high processor and memory usage, potentially affecting the performance of other apps
AiDetectionConfig.modelNotEnabledContent: Please first enable "{models}" in UGRREN AI

AiDescModal.title: Notice for local AI detection
AiDescModal.desc1: Once enabled, the system will use local AI capabilities to analyze video files to detect intrusion, faces, license plates, pets, and packages, etc.
AiDescModal.desc2: The whole process is performed locally, and sensitive face data will be encrypted.
AiDescModal.desc3: You can disable this feature at any time

FaceDescModal.title: Face detection authorization
FaceDescModal.desc1: 1. The face detection results are reported by third‑party cameras you added via the ONVIF protocol. Face information is considered sensitive personal data
FaceDescModal.desc2: 2. Once enabled, the system will receive and store the face detection results reported by the camera and display them in the event list
FaceDescModal.desc3: 3. All data is stored on NAS and will not be uploaded to the cloud (when remotely viewing, the video stream is relayed via encrypted transmission; the relay server does not retain any content)
FaceDescModal.desc4Prefix: 4. You can deselect "Face detection" in the event type list at any time
FaceDescModal.desc4Highlight: and delete the stored face detection results
FaceDescModal.desc5Prefix: 5. Some countries/regions have specific legal requirements regarding facial recognition.
FaceDescModal.desc5Highlight: Please understand and comply with local regulations, and enable this feature with caution

PlateDescModal.title: License plate recognition authorization
PlateDescModal.desc1: Once enabled, the system will recognize license plate numbers in camera frames. Data is encrypted and stored locally. You can disable this feature at any time
PlateDescModal.desc2: Supports up to 500 license plate photos. You can delete them manually. Photos of unknown license plates will be deleted after one month
